Landing.hero_subtitle: Access over 3,000 interactive books on any device. Use stars earned to build your own Avatar and Rocket ship and earn badges for reading and quiz completion.
Landing.banner_alt: Parent and child exploring books together on a tablet in a bright home
Landing.highlights_title: Everything Your Child Needs to Love Reading
Landing.highlights_subtitle: A complete reading platform designed for children and trusted by parents worldwide
Landing.books_description: A vast library of leveled readers for every skill level
Landing.device_description: Read seamlessly on desktop, tablet, or smartphone
Landing.badges_description: Fun achievements that motivate kids to keep reading
Landing.pricing_subtitle: One annual subscription per student on your account—full access to the entire Raz-Japan library and features.
Landing.pricing_billed_annually: Billed annually. Add or manage students anytime from your account.
Landing.pricing_include_books: 3,000+ leveled books in English and Japanese
Landing.pricing_include_features: Audio narration, quizzes, badges, and progress reports
Landing.pricing_include_devices: Works on PC, tablet, and mobile with sync across devices
Landing.read_anywhere_title: 3,000+ Books at Your Fingertips, On Any Device
Landing.read_anywhere_description: Whether at home on the computer, traveling with a tablet, or waiting with a smartphone - your child's entire reading library travels with them. Progress syncs automatically across all devices.
Landing.sync_feature: Seamless sync across PC, tablet, and mobile
Landing.resume_feature: Pick up exactly where you left off
Landing.browser_feature: Available on Kids A-Z mobile app or through web browser
Landing.badges_section_subtitle: Turn reading into an adventure! Children earn exciting badges and rewards as they progress, making them eager to read more every day.
Landing.stars_description: Kids earn stars for every book read and quiz completed. Watch their collection grow!
Landing.achievement_description: 50+ unique badges to unlock for reading streaks, quiz scores, and level completions.
Landing.level_description: Visual level-up system shows children their reading skills improving over time.
Landing.getting_started_subtitle: Join thousands of families who are building confident readers. Get started in just 4 simple steps.
Landing.step_create_account_desc: Sign up in seconds with your email.
Landing.step_add_student: Add a student to your account
Landing.step_add_student_desc: Purchase a subscription or use an activation code to add a student to your account.
Landing.step_get_credentials: Get your login credentials from email or from your dashboard
Landing.step_get_credentials_desc: Access over 3,000 books on any device. Your child can read, listen, and complete fun quizzes.
Landing.step_start_reading_desc: Watch your child's reading skills grow.
Landing.feature_leveled_desc: Over 3,000 Books including 2,500 Leveled Books in 29 reading levels.
Landing.feature_audio_desc: All Leveled Books feature audio recording by native English speaker, no AI generated audio.
Landing.feature_quizzes_desc: Leveled Books (Level A and above) feature comprehension quizzes with instant feedback.
Landing.about_subtitle: Raz-Japan combines proven reading pedagogy with engaging technology to create a comprehensive literacy program. Our platform adapts to each child's unique learning style, making reading practice enjoyable and effective.
Landing.beloved_classroom_tool: The Beloved Classroom Tool now for Home Use
Landing.beloved_classroom_tool_desc: Developed in collaboration with reading specialists and teachers, Raz-Japan is grounded in research-based literacy instruction. Our mission is to make every child a confident, enthusiastic reader.
Landing.contact_subtitle: Have questions? Our friendly support team is here to help you and your family succeed.
Landing.footer_tagline: Empowering children to become confident, enthusiastic readers through personalized, engaging literacy experiences.

content.payment_detail_1: We accept payments by credit cards only.
content.payment_detail_2: The following cards are available: Visa, MasterCard, Diners Club, American Express, JCB, Discover.
content.payment_detail_4: The timing of withdraws depends on the closing date of your credit card.
content.delivery_school: Purchasing with school code / Orders will be shipped to school, according to agreement with school. For more details please contact your school.
content.delivery_guest: Purchasing as guest / Orders will be shipped within 5 days of order confirmation. We will inform you if the item is unavailable or if regular shipping conditions cannot be met.
content.other_costs_school: Purchasing with school code / No charge
content.other_costs_guest: Purchasing as guest / For orders under 9,800 yen (including tax) an 880 yen (including tax) shipping and processing fee will be added.
content.returns_1: 1) If the item is damaged or the wrong item is delivered, we will replace the item.
content.returns_2: 2) If we are unable to replace the item, we will issue a refund for the item.
content.returns_3: 3) Please contact us within 2 weeks of delivery if there is a problem with your purchased item. Shipping fee for return or exchanged items will be covered by Smart Ed.
content.returns_4: 4) We do not accept exchanges or refunds for other reasons except the above listed.

GettingStarted.subtitle: Just follow the steps below and your child will be reading in no time.
GettingStarted.step_2_content: Purchase student account or add with Activation Code
GettingStarted.step_3_content: You will receive an email with classroom name, student username, and student password
GettingStarted.step_4_suffix: or download the Kids A-Z mobile app and login
GettingStarted.step_5_content: Your child is ready to explore our library of books!
GettingStarted.cta_subtitle: Create your free account in under a minute and unlock thousands of books for your child.

Contact.meta_description: Send us a question or feedback using the contact form.
Contact.intro: We'd love to hear from you—submit any questions using the form below.
Contact.success: Thanks! Your message was sent. We will get back to you soon.
Contact.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

Auth.sign_in_subtitle: Welcome back — enter your credentials to access your account.
Auth.sign_up_subtitle: Join Raz-Japan to start your reading journey.
